name: io.github.HarimxChoi/google-surf-mcp
description: Google search via Playwright with a warm Chrome profile. No API key, no proxies.

environmentVariables.name: CHROME_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Chrome binary. Auto-detected on Windows/macOS/Linux when omitted.

environmentVariables.name: SURF_PROFILE_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Directory for the warm Chrome profile. Defaults to ~/.google-surf-mcp.

environmentVariables.name: SURF_TZ
environmentVariables.description: IANA timezone, e.g. America/New_York. Defaults to system timezone.

environmentVariables.name: SURF_HEADLESS
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'false' to run Chrome visibly (demos/debugging). Defaults to true. CAPTCHA recovery always runs visible regardless.

environmentVariables.name: SURF_IDLE_CLOSE_MS
environmentVariables.description: Idle ms before closing the sequential ctx and pool. 0 disables idle auto-close. Defaults to 30000.

environmentVariables.name: SURF_ALLOW_PRIVATE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to allow extract on private/loopback addresses (localhost, 10.x, 192.168.x, 169.254.x, etc). Default blocks them as an SSRF guard.
